---
name: CI
about: Continuous integration config or scripts (ci:)
---

## Summary

<!-- What workflow, runner, or check changed? -->

## Commits

Use **`ci:`** or **`ci(scope):`**, e.g. `ci: pin Node 20 in e2e workflow`.

## Checklist

- [ ] Workflow YAML is valid; secrets and permissions are minimal
- [ ] Related workflows still pass or failure modes are documented
